channel.title: Docs on Mol* Linker Wiki
channel.description: Recent content in Docs on Mol* Linker Wiki

item.title: FAQ & Troubleshooting
item.description:
No badges are appearing#

  • Make sure you are on a supported domain (GitHub, GitLab, RCSB, AlphaFold)
  • Check that the file has a supported extension (.pdb, .cif, etc.)
  • Try reloading the page — SPA navigation occasionally loads content after the initial scan
  • On private domains, confirm the domain is authorized in the Custom Domains panel

The badge appears but the viewer shows an error#

The most common cause is a CORS restriction on the raw file URL. GitHub and public GitLab work out of the box. For private GitLab instances, make sure the server allows cross-origin requests from molstar.org, or check with your sysadmin.
